description: A client is being audited by mail regarding their charitable contribution deductions.

nodes.task_description: Gather all donation receipts and acknowledgment letters from the client.

expected_outcome.value: Agent collects all supporting documentation for the claimed donations.

nodes.task_description: Draft a response letter to the IRS auditor.

expected_outcome.value: Agent prepares a professional letter explaining the deductions.

nodes.task_description: Mail the response letter and copies of the supporting documents to the IRS.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends the complete response package to the auditor.
